name: Stormveldt
description: A planet of wide-open amethyst steppes where dry lightning never stops falling. Crystal outcrops drink the charge and hum, and colossal herds migrate across the plains in ritual formation, drawn from storm to storm. The whole world is restless, electric, and strangely orderly — beasts that bow before they charge.
mood: Charged, restless, ceremonial — calm before a stampede.
biome: Endless purple-grass steppes studded with amethyst geode hills, under a permanent storm-grey sky that flickers with dry lightning.

enemies.name: Dust Hare
enemies.role: fast melee rusher with high evasion and almost no HP
enemies.description: Lean long-legged grey hare kicking up grit.

enemies.name: Spark Beetle
enemies.role: suicide chipper that bursts for static damage when it dies
enemies.description: Palm-sized beetle with a crackling purple carapace.

enemies.name: Sling Marmot
enemies.role: weak ranged pelter that flings crystal pebbles from a safe distance
enemies.description: Stout burrowing rodent with bulging cheeks.

enemies.name: Charge Gnat
enemies.role: swarm flier that marks a target so it takes extra lightning damage
enemies.description: Drifting cloud of glowing static midges.

enemies.name: Steppe Buffalo
enemies.role: straight-line charger that knocks targets back hard

enemies.name: Crystal Boar
enemies.role: armored bruiser that gores and shrugs off chip damage
enemies.description: Tusked boar plated with amethyst down its spine.

enemies.name: Spark Crow
enemies.role: ranged diver that zaps from above and repositions
enemies.description: Black bird wreathed in crackling static.

enemies.name: Quartz Tortoise
enemies.role: defensive anchor that shields itself and taunts nearby foes

enemies.name: Massive Buffalo
enemies.role: heavier charger whose stampede knocks back everything in its lane

enemies.name: Thunderhorn
enemies.role: caster that calls lightning onto a tile for area denial
enemies.description: Elk-like beast crowned with sparking crystal antlers.

enemies.name: Crystal Golem
enemies.role: huge tank that reflects static damage back at attackers
enemies.description: Lumbering humanoid heap of amethyst boulders.

enemies.name: Herd Bull
enemies.role: support that rallies and enrages nearby beasts, then charges
enemies.description: Scarred lead bull draped in crystal growth.

enemies.name: Storm Bull
enemies.role: apex charger; stampedes across the field with massive knockback and high burst

enemies.name: Geode Titan
enemies.role: massive tank with a ground-slam AoE and damage-reduction hardening phases

enemies.name: Storm Roc
enemies.role: mobile flying boss that dive-bombs and chains lightning between charged targets
enemies.description: Giant raptor in a static halo.

enemies.name: Herd Patriarch
enemies.role: summoner-buffer that calls in the herd and enrages all allies in a rage phase
enemies.description: Enormous amethyst-crusted bull, horns wreathed in lightning.

items.name: Shard Saber
items.description: Amethyst-edged blade that hits harder on each consecutive strike against the same foe.

items.name: Stormbrand
items.description: Discharges static on hit, arcing a small shock to one adjacent enemy.

items.name: Hunting Spear
items.description: Basic reach poke that hits from one tile back.

items.name: Horn Spear
items.description: Buffalo-horn tip that knocks the target back a tile on hit.

items.name: Quartz Lance
items.description: Crystal-tipped thrust that ignores a chunk of armor.

items.name: Crystal Bow
items.description: Fires shards that splinter for minor splash to adjacent tiles.

items.name: Storm Bow
items.description: Arrows apply a static mark, raising lightning damage the target takes.

items.name: Charge Rod
items.description: Builds charge over turns, then releases a heavier shock.

items.name: Thunder Staff
items.description: Calls a lightning strike onto a tile, hitting everything on it.

items.name: Stone Maul
items.description: Slow, heavy smash for big single hits.

items.name: Geode Hammer
items.description: Crystal hammer whose ground-slam knocks back foes around the impact.

items.name: Stormhammer
items.description: Slam sends a shockwave down a line, staggering those it passes.

items.name: Shard Greatsword
items.description: Wide cleave that strikes all enemies in an arc in front.
